test_cases.title: Yaw Rate Sensor Sampling Verification
test_cases.description: Verify yaw rate input is sampled at 100 Hz by checking output updates every 10 ms.
pass_criteria: Brake torque outputs update at every simulation step (0.01 s)

test_cases.title: Reference Yaw Rate Computation Accuracy
test_cases.description: Apply known steering input at constant speed and verify the reference yaw rate calculation matches the expected bicycle model output.
pass_criteria: Brake torque outputs respond consistently with bicycle-model reference yaw rate computation

test_cases.title: Corrective Braking Activation
test_cases.description: Inject a yaw rate deviation from the reference and verify brake torque commands are issued to counteract the instability.
pass_criteria: At least one brake torque output becomes non-zero during the yaw rate deviation
Brake torque reduces toward zero as yaw rate error is corrected

test_cases.title: Low-Speed Disable Verification
test_cases.description: At vehicle speed below 10 m/s, verify the stability controller outputs zero brake torque regardless of yaw rate error.
pass_criteria: All four brake torque outputs remain zero throughout the simulation

test_cases.title: Sideslip Contribution to Control Moment
test_cases.description: Verify that sideslip angle estimation contributes to the corrective yaw moment by comparing controller output with and without lateral acceleration input.
pass_criteria: Brake torque outputs differ from the case where LateralAcceleration is held at zero, confirming sideslip contribution

test_cases.title: Positive Moment Brake Distribution
test_cases.description: During a positive corrective yaw moment, verify brake torque is applied to the correct wheels per the distribution logic.
pass_criteria: When corrective moment is positive, brake torque is applied to the appropriate side per LeftRightSelect logic
The opposite side outputs zero torque

test_cases.title: High-Speed Stability Intervention
test_cases.description: At highway speed (60 m/s), verify the controller correctly computes and distributes corrective yaw moment.
pass_criteria: Brake torque commands are non-zero during the yaw rate deviation
Controller output is stable without oscillation at high speed

_traceability_notes.REQ-SCS-006: NO TEST LINKED — Real-time execution constraint (5 ms WCET) cannot be verified in MIL simulation
